title: How much of a fan are you
display_title: How much of a fan are you
wikitext:
[]: How much of a fan are you?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Feb 13, 2009 6:36 pm What would you call yourself in terms of liking Evangelion? Casual or Geek or Obsessed? I'm a big fan. I'm not over the top, but I discuss the series regularly in real life and I own all the epsiodes, and a good amount of action figures.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Feb 13, 2009 6:38 pm I'm getting a tattoo with Asuka on it.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsachoul » Fri Feb 13, 2009 6:44 pm I own the series and just bought the movie, but don't own any figures. Yet. Probably somewhere in between casual and geek.

[]:             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Fri Feb 13, 2009 7:01 pm When I first got into, Eva, I was completely obsessed. Action figures, videos, DVDs, manga, models, posters, pictures printed off the internet covering my walls, a T-shirt, fanart I drew, you name it. Then I completely forgot it existed. Now I'm obsessed again but in a different way. My collection of Eva merch has thinned a lot but now I spend all of my time making connections between Eva and nearly every aspect of my life. I think about it almost all the time. And I had been doing such a good job staying grounded in reality too.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Fri Feb 13, 2009 7:02 pm Used to be obsessed, but it kinda went away...

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Feb 13, 2009 7:07 pm I'm a casually obsessed geek.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 13, 2009 7:14 pm I'm obsessed, but it doesn't effect the other parts of my personal life. Although lately, it's kinda been going away. Maybe since I've recently started watching a more variety of anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Feb 13, 2009 7:37 pm I'm somewhere in between casual and geek also. I have been a fan since 1996 at the age of five, and I still love the series today but it not my #1 favorite thing in life though since I'm fan of other series also.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Feb 13, 2009 8:21 pm casgeesessed.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 13, 2009 8:42 pm Evangelion and I have been going steady for a while. Over nine years now. The days of passion, they're more or less gone. But there's a lot of dedication. I have flings on the side, but when they're over, NGE is always there, waiting with open arms for me to come home. It doesn't care how much I cheat. And if I put in a little effort into our relationship, I can feel the romance again, if only for a little while, and remember why the two of us fell in love in the first place... Yeah, I guess that's the best I can describe it. Guyver Spawn wrote: I have been a fan since 1996 at the age of five

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Feb 13, 2009 9:00 pm I'd say I'm definitely a geek regarding Eva, just bordering on obsession, but I actually have a life beyond the 'net, so I'm not obsessed Reichu wrote: Guyver Spawn wrote: I have been a fan since 1996 at the age of five

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Feb 13, 2009 9:32 pm I have the series and the movies but I don't have any of the wacky merchandise. I still obsess over it, but I obsess over everything. My brain is a catalogue of obsession that warps the light of knowledge and all that crap. I might be in the minority here, but I'm not really big on much anime outside of Eva. I obsess over a wide variety of mediums, so I supposes it's kind of spaced out with all these different obsessions fighting for dominance.

[]:             Quote Post by Xeroko » Fri Feb 13, 2009 10:32 pm I own the whole series, the movies, and a figure. So I guess I'm a moderate geek.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Feb 13, 2009 11:39 pm Who the hell was letting you watch NGE at the age of FIVE?

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Sat Feb 14, 2009 12:56 am I'm a pretty big fan of it, I guess. I use NGE backgrounds on my laptop and I have the manga, but I don't think I'd ever get NGE action figures or t-shirts or anything like that. I don't even watch it that often. I guess I just like the concept and the characters (Rei, especially).

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sat Feb 14, 2009 1:47 am How big of a fan am I? HOW BIG OF A FAN AM I?!? I watched the last two episodes and was only confused for two months. That's how big a fan of the show I am.

[]:             Quote Post by nozunam » Sat Feb 14, 2009 5:26 am I used to be obsessed when the day it aired on tv at '96.. after rewatching it a while ago, i've been looking forward to the live action movie and the rebuilds. thinking of seeing Asuka in real life gives me the shivers crazy [/i]

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Feb 14, 2009 5:53 am I don't know what kind of fan to call myself. Yeah I love Evangelion to the point of making a parody and I decided to start buying some of the stuff. I have the Angelic Days Manga and Platinum Perfect Collection. I do plan on buying End of Evangelion on DVD, Death and Rebirth, and eventually the manga adaption of Evangelion. Oh yeah and the Eva rebuild 1.0 DVD and when ever the heck it comes out, the english dub DVD of RoE So... What would the right word be for me? A big casual fan? An odd obsessed fan? A casual obsessed fan? I think I'll go with #3

[]:             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Sat Feb 14, 2009 7:10 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: I don't know what can of fan to call myself.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sat Feb 14, 2009 7:23 am Reichu wrote: Who the hell was letting you watch NGE at the age of FIVE?
summary:
[]: How much of a fan are you?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Feb 13, 2009 6:36 pm What would you call yourself in terms of liking Evangelion? Casual or Geek or Obsessed? I'm a big fan. I'm not over the top, but I discuss the series regularly in real life and I own all the epsiodes, and a good amount of action figures.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion &raq
